name: pmetra
description: AI-driven parametric CAD — control 3D geometry via MCP tools

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List all exposed resources, components, and materials

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Get current value of a resource or component

tools.name: set_resource
tools.description: Patch a resource or component — triggers geometry rebuild

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture PNG screenshot of the 3D viewport

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Get field-level schema for a registered type

tools.name: load_shape
tools.description: Load Truck JSON geometry into the scene

tools.name: save_shape
tools.description: Save a shape back to Truck JSON

tools.name: load_step
tools.description: Load a STEP file into the scene

tools.name: delete_shape
tools.description: Remove a shape from the scene

tools.name: simulate_touch
tools.description: Dispatch synthetic touch on the 3D canvas

skills.name: Parametric CAD Control
skills.description: Control parametric 3D CAD geometry — set parameters, load shapes, take screenshots
